text.title: Client Conventions Intake Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the intake-report artefact. A report that does not validate cannot be committed to the engagement's docs/ folder.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "cci-acme-2026-05", "client": "ACME Corp", "engagement_start": "2026-05-23", "contact_email": "lead@acme.com", "dimensions": { "branching": {"stated": "trunk-based, max 2 days", "source": "BRANCHING.md"}, "commit_style": {"stated": "conventional-commits, squash", "source": ".github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md"}, "code_review": {"stated": "1 reviewer, 4h SLA", "source": "lead@acme.com 2026-05-22"}, "naming": {"stated": "kebab-case for files, snake_case Python", "source": "CONVENTIONS.md"}, "ci_gates": {"stated": "lint+test+typecheck BLOCK", "source": ".github/workflows/ci.yml"}, "security": {"stated": "no secrets in git, OP vault", "source": "SECURITY.md"}, "documentation": {"stated": "AGENTS.md per dir", "source": "lead@acme.com 2026-05-22"}, "communication": {"stated": "Slack #engineering, async by default", "source": "lead@acme.com 2026-05-22"} }, "mismatches": [], "signoff": {"signed_by": "lead@acme.com", "signed_at": "2026-05-23"}, "verdict": "commit-record", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: artefact_id missing cci- prefix; engagement_start not ISO; contact is team alias (r3); only 1 of 8 dimensions present (r1); dimension.branching missing source (r2); unresolved mismatch (r4); signoff empty (r3); verdict=commit-record impossible; version + last_reviewed malformed.

antipattern.description: Any dimension missing OR missing its source field.
antipattern.reason: r1 + r2 violation; report unfit for downstream automation.

antipattern.description: mismatches[] non-empty with any item lacking resolution.
antipattern.reason: r4 violation; unresolved mismatches block sign-off.
r3 violation; team-alias sign-off is no sign-off.
